notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. grounds into a double play, pitcher Grant Holmes to catcher Chadwick Tromp to first baseman Matt Olson. Jorbit Vivas out at home. Keibert Ruiz to 3rd. James Wood to 2nd. Luis García Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. grounds into a double play, pitcher Grant Holmes to catcher Chadwick Tromp to first baseman Matt Olson. Jorbit Vivas out at home. Keibert Ruiz to 3rd. James Wood to 2nd. Luis García Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (force play), call on the field was overturned: Matt Olson reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Jorbit Vivas. Michael Harris II to 2nd. Michael Harris II advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Jorbit Vivas.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski plunked
notableEvents.detail: Nationals challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Mike Yastrzemski hit by pitch.
